title: GitHub Fine-grained PAT permission edit via webbot
desc: Edit GH_PAT scopes (e.g. add secrets:write) without regenerating. Fine-grained PATs allow permission updates in-place — token value stays the same.
steps: 2. a11y find token ID from list page
5. Set permission hidden input: document.querySelector('input[name="integration[default_permissions][secrets]"]').value='write' then dispatchEvent change
6. JS click Update button to save
7. Token value unchanged -- only scopes widened
author: claude
